title: Kommande vecka: Nvidia, Nibe och Sivers
summary_md:
# Kommande vecka: Nvidia, Nibe och Sivers

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-15  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

A weekly earnings-preview episode focused on a packed reporting calendar: Bure (Monday), Nibe (Tuesday), and a Wednesday cluster including Sivers Semiconductors, plus Nvidia's results from the US as the highlight. The market mood is anticipatory, with notable enthusiasm and caution around the explosive run in Sivers and elevated expectations for Nvidia's Blackwell rollout.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 NIBE-B — Nibe | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

Reports Tuesday; kept 2026 growth targets despite German law setback; geopolitical gas-price debate favours heat pumps and has lifted the stock.

#### Reasoning

Hosts frame Nibe positively into the Tuesday report: management did not panic over Germany scrapping parts of the 65% renewable-heating mandate and reaffirmed full-year 2026 growth targets. Rising gas prices and Middle East tensions strengthen the structural case for heat pumps, which has already driven a recent rally.

#### Sell Triggers

- if 2026 growth targets are cut at the report
- if German regulatory rollback hits order intake
- if gas prices normalise lower

> *"Vd Gert-Erik Lindqvist drabbades dock inte av panik– –och bolaget stod fast vid sina tillväxtmål för helåret 2026."*

---

### 🟠 SIVE — Sivers Semiconductors | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Stock up 900%+ YTD with heavy US inflow; shorting risen sharply; valuation hugely stretched — quarter is 'up to prove it'.

#### Reasoning

Hosts flag extreme volatility and risk: a near-meme stock up over 900% in 2026 on large US inflows, with shorting climbing dramatically. With valuation enormously inflated, the upcoming quarter is decisive for whether investors keep backing it.

#### Sell Triggers

- if quarterly results disappoint vs inflated valuation
- if US inflow reverses
- if short squeeze unwinds

> *"så har aktien rusat över 900 % hittills under 2026– –med ett stort inflöde från USA. Blankningarna har ökat dramatiskt– –och det är nu upp till bevis för det här halvledarbolaget."*

---

### 🟠 NVDA — Nvidia | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

Reports Wednesday in US, last of Mag7; EPS expected +85%, revenue +78%; focus on Blackwell rollout and forward guidance.

#### Reasoning

The week's headline event. Expectations are very high with consensus EPS growth near 85% and revenue up 78% year-on-year. Market focus is on the Blackwell chip rollout and forward outlook, making the report a key catalyst for sentiment.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Blackwell rollout guidance disappoints
- if results miss elevated expectations
- if forward outlook weakens

> *"Vinst per aktie väntas öka med nästan 85 %– –omsättningen med 78 % mot jämförelsekvartalet."*

---
